global_principles: Compression rows are cognitive assets: creation and navigation use the same profile id.
Preserve authority, voice, reversals, evidence, next moves, and lifecycle state.
Do not copy long ancestry into every row; use proof heads, counts, and drilldown refs.
Volatile facts live as dynamic fact rows with observed_at, probe/source, and fingerprint.
Compression depth is artifact-kind-specific: stable band names do not imply fixed sentence counts.
Lower brackets win on conflict; higher brackets are re-emitted when they drift from source authority.

profiles.purpose: Voice-preserving contextual compression over raw-seed paragraphs, paragraph-bin shards, and atomized child shards.

source_ladder.role: voice authority; never rewritten or treated as derived
syntax-faithful cleanup candidate; no global inference
normalized lower-bracket voice claim with parent par_* and voice anchor
system-context reading over paragraph and shard evidence
controller-gated proposal surface, not compression authority
durable principle, skill, paper module, standard, or code update after apply

context.job: working-set row for a worker or navigator

minimum_payload: local source excerpts or shard rows

allowed_loss: full sibling prose outside the focus window
distant edges already recoverable from ledgers
forbidden_collapse: contradictions into a single resolved claim
directional gestures into overconfident implementation plans

source_state_policy.rule: Fresh unsharded raw-seed paragraphs are still authority; mark source_state rather than dropping them or pretending shard coverage exists.

context_space_policy.rule: Before compressing a shard into a higher row, identify the context-space: the paper module, skill, standard, runtime surface, profile, or cross-section that makes the shard intelligible.
context_space_policy.missing_context_behavior: Emit a lower band or add validation_notes; do not invent system context.

facet_telescope_policy.statement: Telescope, Russian doll, and holographic compression name the same tiered-compression behavior. For raw seed, the row and each important facet can expand through bands while raw voice remains source authority.

facets.rule: Preserve voice anchors and operator uncertainty at every band; deeper bands add context, not rewritten authority.
A claim starts as one routable gesture and expands into contextual readings only after source_state is declared.
Name the paper module, skill, standard, runtime surface, or profile that makes the shard intelligible before higher compression.
Carry proof heads and drilldown refs at lower bands; open source excerpts only at deep band.
Contradictions, old-regime statements, and reversals are preserved as structured context instead of collapsed into one resolved claim.
Omission receipts say which ancestry, sibling rows, or neighborhoods were left in ledgers.
Each band names the safe next bracket or drilldown rather than forcing the navigator to guess.

validation_probe: context-space is present before context or deep compression
voice anchor remains traceable to par_* or shard id

navigable_scopes.rule: One authored raw-seed paragraph or operator-voice entry.
One atomized claim/gesture row derived from raw voice with source_state declared.
One context-space-aware compression row routed to a paper module, skill, standard, runtime surface, or profile.
A bridge/controller review packet over candidate routes and omissions.

navigable_facets.rule: The surrounding system plane that makes the claim intelligible.
Proof heads, source ids, and drilldown refs.
Contradictions, old-regime statements, and later corrections.
Known skipped ancestry, sibling rows, and neighborhoods.
Safe next bracket, drilldown, or curation route.

scope:raw_paragraph.source: raw_seed.md through the sanctioned raw-seed lane

band:deep.source: source paragraph plus referenced context-space evidence

worker_tier_policy.cheap_selector: embed, cluster, rank, detect freshness, and suggest candidate context-spaces
worker_tier_policy.syntax_worker: clean speech-to-text and split candidate statements without global inference
worker_tier_policy.distiller: produce atomized shards with voice anchors and gestures_towards
worker_tier_policy.contextual_compressor: create reversible profile rows using paper/module context
worker_tier_policy.controller: route, apply, author durable doctrine, or change standards

batching_policy.rule: Bridge packets may carry multiple paragraphs, but packet membership is transport evidence only. Multi-source rows require a named shared context-space.
batching_policy.production_target: Use embedding/cosine neighborhoods as semantic candidates, then fit them chronologically into adjustable bridge-budget bins.

drilldown_policy.default: Open the declared navigator skill, then the profile, then the cited par_* or shard refs.

dynamic_fact_policy.rule: Never freeze live counts as prose when a refreshable fact row can carry them.

must: row has profile_id and creator/navigator skill ids
row has drilldown_refs
dynamic facts include observed_at and fingerprint
source ancestry is referenced, not copied
row declares or implies a source_state
context-space is named before shard-level contextual compression

profiles.purpose: Navigation contract for reading the compression profile registry itself through profile-native bands, scopes, facets, authority, currentness, and skill edges.

source_ladder.role: authored candidate profile object; source authority for profile ids, bands, contracts, and policies
compiled browse/drilldown projection over one profile object
read-only compliance/audit row that lets Atlas and navigation prioritize missing, drafted, and declared contracts

profile_id.purpose: Cheap browse identity for one compression profile row.
forbidden: treat profile-declared bands as adapter-supported bands

bands.purpose: Expose the profile's native density ladder and whether each band is data, adapter support, or profile contract.
forbidden: collapse profile-native bands into global flag/card/context/deep semantics

band_contracts.purpose: Read each profile band's job, minimum payload, forbidden collapse, and next drilldown.
forbidden: claim row population without the population_policy

source_ladder.purpose: Expose source authority, source-state transitions, creator and navigator skills, and validation probes.
forbidden: replace source authority with a generated card

navigable_scopes.rule: One declared band within one profile's band_contracts object.
One source-state or authority transition within a profile.
One worker tier or role lane that creates, refreshes, validates, or consumes the profile.

navigable_facets.rule: Fields, voice anchors, authority pointers, or lifecycle state that must survive compression.
Content that can be omitted when a packet carries counts, proof heads, and drilldowns.
Compression failures that a row must name rather than silently perform.
Which worker or skill can select, create, refresh, validate, or navigate profile rows.

allowed_loss: full sibling profile bodies when a row carries counts and drilldowns
full render profile payload lists outside the selected profile
long source manifest field lists when the source profile is one drilldown away
forbidden_collapse: profile-declared bands into option-surface adapter support
render profile output authority into source profile authority
candidate registry status into mature std_* authority
profile ids into natural-language labels without exact ids

currentness_policy.rule: Rows remain projections over codex/doctrine/compression_profiles.json; the registry parses as JSON and card/flag surfaces report profile_registry_available with source mtime.

dependency_neighborhood_policy.rule: Expose creator_skill_id, navigator_skill_id, context_profile_id, render profile siblings, owner_routes, and source authority as first-order edges; downshift wider registry neighborhoods to counts plus card drilldowns.

worker_tier_policy.selector: Use the compression_profiles flag/card option surface to select exact profile ids.
worker_tier_policy.contract_auditor: Use kind_band_contract_audit to classify profile-declared, drafted, and missing navigation contracts.
worker_tier_policy.controller: Promote drafts only by editing the governing standard or profile source and rerunning compliance scanners.
worker_tier_policy.atlas_navigator: Use contract_status, population_policy, and evidence_refs as prioritization signals after entry has selected the lane.

must: profile ids are unique
declared bands have band_contracts entries
profile-declared bands stay separate from adapter-supported flag/card bands
creator and navigator skill ids are present
kind-band contract audit reports compression_profiles as profile_declared

profiles.purpose: Upload-safe external Type B grounding packet rendered from the raw_seed_voice_context_v1 projection model without exposing private raw voice or assigning repository commands to the receiver.
profiles.receiver_intent: Ground a cold Type B web-app reasoning session in current public-safe substrate state so it can answer the operator's next task without inventing private evidence.
profiles.job_to_be_done: Let Type B answer the operator's next task without repo access, without inventing private evidence, with source-provided A-B shuttle trace ids preserved, and with ASK_TYPE_A handles for private facts. Type B reasons; Type A verifies and mutates.
profiles.intended_decision_or_deliverable: A Type B reply that respects the public/private boundary, cites the system thesis + current frame, preserves source-provided shuttle identity without treating tab ordinals as authority, names known failure modes from up-propagation evidence, and surfaces ASK_TYPE_A handles for any private fact a real next move would depend on.
profiles.validation_prompt: After upload, the receiver should answer in four short sentences: (1) what is this system, (2) what telos should this answer preserve, (3) what should not happen, (4) what should Type A verify next. Inability to answer = render failure.
profiles.authority_boundary: public_safe_projection; not source authority; not permission to publish/email/open-source/grant-repo-access

must: render does not invalidate raw_seed_voice_context_v1 contextual rows
render does not modify _row_staleness_reasons behaviour
render declares it is a profile of system_self_comprehension_root
00_READ_ME_FIRST appears in first 4000 bytes of output
01_PACKET_MANIFEST declares context_profile_id and render_profile_id
no operator identity / home path / email / obsidian path leaks to output
no browser-automation provider symbols in output
no command framed as instruction to the receiver

profiles.purpose: Standalone public-safe system packet that describes the ai_workflow substrate at high density without exposing private raw voice or requiring repo access. The wide-coverage nucleus; the Type B grounding packet is its compact primer sibling.
profiles.receiver_intent: Give a cold Type B model or human reviewer enough public-safe system context to understand ai_workflow as a whole and reason about later operator tasks without private repo access.
profiles.job_to_be_done: Describe the system: thesis, current frame, MAPE-K and viable-system control loops, distillation spine, surface map, doctrine inventory, WorkItem spine snapshot, prompt shelf + Type B up-propagation, navigation surfaces, provider/bridge lanes, dissemination posture, motifs, vocabulary, closure ledger, known failure modes, ASK_TYPE_A handles, omission boundary.
profiles.authority_boundary: public_safe_projection; not source authority; not permission to publish/email/open-source/grant-repo-access

must: render does not invalidate raw_seed_voice_context_v1 contextual rows
render does not modify _row_staleness_reasons behaviour
render declares it is a profile of system_self_comprehension_root
root slug exists in the paper-module index
paper-module count matches codex/doctrine/paper_modules/_index.json
first ~3 KB describes what the system is, not what the packet is
section headers cover thesis, current frame, actor axes, surface map
doctrine inventory cites paper module count and standards group count
WorkItem spine snapshot present with state counts
prompt shelf up-propagation snapshot present with record/candidate/adopted counts
ASK_TYPE_A register present
omission receipt present
no operator identity / home path / email leaks to output
no browser-automation provider symbols in output
no command framed as instruction to the receiver
